heartrate_init.tooltip: Initialize the heart rate sensor by selecting an analog pin from the current board

heartrate_update.tooltip: Update heart rate sensor sample data; call continuously in loop

heartrate_get_bpm.tooltip: Get the current heart rate in beats per minute

heartrate_get_wave.message0: heart rate sensor %1 get waveform value
heartrate_get_wave.tooltip: Get the current waveform value for serial plotter display
